spec_compliance.rule: name: lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only

spec_compliance.detail: Description clearly explains when to use the skill

best_practices.title: Simple single-file structure
best_practices.detail: Appropriate for a minimal skill with no complex logic

grade_assessment: A well-structured minimal skill that follows the specification correctly with no security concerns.
grade_strengths: Clean, minimal structure appropriate for the skill's simplicity.
Good description with trigger phrases for accurate activation.
No security issues — no tool usage, no external access.
